raw.subject: St. Louis mobile mechanic in St Louis
raw.body:
Hi,

I see you're serving St. Louis and surrounding areas, which is impressive given the size of the city.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might make it harder for customers to find you when they need emergency services.

I sketched a page idea from your Facebook that includes an emergency call CTA, a list of services, and a service area map to help you reach more customers.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/st-louis-mobile-mechanic-st-louis

Let's discuss how a simple website could help you grow your business. For local businesses like yours, I offer a flat fee that makes web development affordable.

Reply or give me a quick call to learn more.
